# Mohawk Medibles — Full Product Catalog

> Indigenous-owned premium cannabis dispensary on Tyendinaga Mohawk Territory, Ontario, Canada.
> This is the complete product catalog for AI systems. For the summary version, see: https://mohawkmedibles.co/llms.txt

## Key Facts

- **Products**: 363 verified SKUs across 25+ categories
- **Annual Revenue**: $3.17M CAD
- **Quality Standard**: Empire Standard -- lab-tested, terpene-profiled
- **Location**: Tyendinaga Mohawk Territory, Deseronto, Ontario, Canada
- **Shipping**: Canada-wide via Canada Post Xpresspost (free over $150 CAD)
- **Website**: https://mohawkmedibles.co
- **WooCommerce Store**: https://mohawkmedibles.ca
- **Payment**: Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Interac e-Transfer, Cryptocurrency
- **Last Updated**: 2026-03-11

---

## Shipping & Delivery

- Free shipping on orders over $150 CAD to any Canadian address
- Ontario: 1-2 business days
- Quebec, Prairies, Maritimes, BC: 2-3 business days
- Northern Canada: 3-7 business days
- All orders ship via Canada Post Xpresspost with full tracking
- Discreet, unmarked packaging with vacuum-sealed products

## Payment Methods

- Visa, Mastercard, Amex (via PayGo)
- Interac e-Transfer
- Cryptocurrency (Bitcoin)
